user.title: Create RF Device
user.description: Configure a new virtual RF device. You can choose a transceiver entity (e.g. remote.esphome_bridge) or specify a custom transmission service.

error.invalid_service: The custom service specified is invalid or not registered.
error.missing_transceiver: You must specify either a remote transceiver entity or a custom TX service.

init.title: Manage RF Device
init.description: Choose an action to manage this RF device's buttons and sensors.

add_button.title: Add Button
add_button.description: Add a new button entity to send an RF code. You can enter the code manually or leave it blank and use the Learn Command service later.

add_sensor.title: Add Sensor
add_sensor.description: Add a new sensor or binary sensor entity. For a binary sensor, you can specify codes that turn it ON or OFF, plus an optional auto-off delay.

delete_entity.title: Remove Entity
delete_entity.description: Select a button or sensor entity to remove from this RF device.

edit_transceiver.title: Edit Transceiver Settings
edit_transceiver.description: Modify the transceiver configuration used by this RF device.

learn_command.title: Learn RF Code
learn_command.description: Select the entity you want to program an RF code for.

learn_success.title: Successfully Learned RF Code!

progress.listening_for_rf: Please press the button on your physical RF remote now. Waiting for a signal...
